name: Heaptrace Editorial
bio: Sample author record for CMS demos and QA.

title: Welcome to the Heaptrace journal: sample post for your Sanity-powered blog
excerpt: Use this first sample entry to confirm Studio publishing, categories, authors, and portable text render correctly on the marketing site before you ship production articles from your team.
seoDescription: Sanity CMS sample blog post for Heaptrace Technology: verify dataset import and Next.js blog routes.

children.text: This is your first sample blog entry in Sanity. It proves your dataset, schema validation, and Next.js integration are wired correctly from Studio to /blog and /blog-posts/[slug].
Open Sanity Studio, duplicate this post, replace the portable text, add a cover image, and publish. Your updates appear on the site after the Next.js app rebuilds or refreshes cached content.
